【Main】/【Action】Choose 1 enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower. Deal 3 damage to it. If there are 2 or more cards with "Improved Technique" in their card name in your trash, choose 1 enemy Unit instead.

name: Improved Technique
effect:
【Burst】Activate this card's 【Main】.
【Main】/【Action】Choose 1 enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower. Deal 3 damage to it. If there are 2 or more cards with "Improved Technique" in their card name in your trash, choose 1 enemy Unit instead.

name: Eliminate Target
effect: 【Main】/【Action】Choose 1 Pilot paired with an enemy Unit that is Lv.5 or lower. Destroy it.

name: Infiltrator Present
effect:
【Main】/【Action】Choose 1 friendly (Mafty) Unit. It gets AP+3 during this turn.
【Pilot】[Emeralda Zubin]

name: Warped Intent
effect:
【Burst】Add this card to your hand.
【Main】/【Action】During this turn, all Units paired with a Pilot get AP+2.

name: Human Karma
effect: 【Main】/【Action】Choose 1 active friendly Unit. Rest it. If you do, choose 1 enemy Unit whose Lv. is equal to or lower than the Unit rested with this ability. Deal 3 damage to it.

name: Look of Determination
effect:
【Burst】Activate this card's 【Action】.
【Action】Choose 1 active enemy Unit that is Lv.2 or lower. Destroy it. If there are 10 or more cards in your trash, choose 1 active enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower instead.

name: Look of Determination
effect:
【Burst】Activate this card's 【Action】.
【Action】Choose 1 active enemy Unit that is Lv.2 or lower. Destroy it. If there are 10 or more cards in your trash, choose 1 active enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower instead.

name: Distant Reunion
effect:
【Action】Choose 1 friendly Unit paired with an (X-Rounder) Pilot. It can't receive battle damage from enemy Units with 2 or less AP during this battle. If you are Lv.7 or higher, it can't receive battle damage from enemy Units with 5 or less AP instead.
【Pilot】[Yurin L'Ciel]

name: Towards Destiny
effect: 【Main】/【Action】Choose 1 friendly (Vagan) Unit and 1 enemy Unit. Deal 2 damage to them.

name: Orga's Order
effect: 【Main】If 1 to 4 enemy Units are in play, deploy 1 [Graze Custom]((Tekkadan)･AP2･HP2) Unit token. If 5 or more are in play, deploy 1 [Gundam Barbatos 4th Form]((Tekkadan)･AP4･HP4) Unit token.

name: Awakened Potential
effect:
【Burst】Add this card to your hand.
【Action】Choose 1 rested enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower. Return it to its owner's hand. Then, if there are 2 or more cards with "Awakened Potential" in their card name in your trash, you may choose 1 friendly Unit. It gains <Blocker> during this turn.
(Rest this Unit to change the attack target to it.)

name: Awakened Potential
effect:
【Burst】Add this card to your hand.
【Action】Choose 1 rested enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower. Return it to its owner's hand. Then, if there are 2 or more cards with "Awakened Potential" in their card name in your trash, you may choose 1 friendly Unit. It gains <Blocker> during this turn.
(Rest this Unit to change the attack target to it.)

name: Awkward Approach
effect: 【Main】Choose 1 rested friendly Base. Set it as active. If you do, all enemy Units get AP-1 during this turn.

name: Immortal Colasour
effect:
【Main】During this turn, if a friendly (Superpower Bloc)/(UN) Unit destroys an enemy Unit with battle damage, choose 1 rested friendly (Superpower Bloc)/(UN) Unit. Set it as active. It can't attack during this turn.
【Pilot】[Patrick Colasour]

name: Unheralded Attack
effect:
【Action】Choose 1 friendly Base and 1 enemy Unit with 3 or less HP. Rest them.
【Pilot】[Katz Kobayashi]

name: Veteran Tactics
effect:
【Action】Choose 1 enemy Unit that is Lv.3 or lower. Return it to its owner's hand.
【Pilot】[Sergei Smirnov]

name: Jupitris
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand. Then, if a friendly (Jupitris) Unit is in play, choose 1 enemy Unit that is Lv.3 or lower. Rest it.

name: Ribo Colony
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand.
【Once per Turn】When you pair a Pilot that is Lv.3 or lower with one of your Units, choose 1 enemy Unit with 3 or less HP. Rest it.
sourceTitle: Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket

name: Peacemillion
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand.
【Once per Turn】During your turn, when a friendly (Operation Meteor)/(G Team) Unit that is Lv.6 or higher destroys an enemy Unit with battle damage, that friendly Unit may recover 2 HP.

name: Cyclops Team
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand.
All friendly Unit tokens get AP+1 during your opponent's turn.
sourceTitle: Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket

name: Jachin Due
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand. Then, Choose 1 friendly (ZAFT) Unit. It gets AP+3 during this turn.

name: Doritea
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand.
【Once per Turn】During your opponent's turn, when one of your Units is rested by one of your opponent's effects, choose 1 enemy Unit. Deal 1 damage to it.

name: Hotarubi
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand.
During your turn, when one of your friendly (Tekkadan)/(Teiwaz) Units receives effect damage, you may rest this Base. If you do, place the top card of your deck into your trash.

name: Downes
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand. Then, if it is your turn, you may choose 1 (Vagan) Unit card that is Lv.4 or lower from your trash. Pay its cost to deploy it.

name: Eternal
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand. Then, if you have 2 or more (Triple Ship Alliance) Units in play, choose 1 enemy Unit that is Lv.4 or lower. Return it to its owner's hand.

name: Radish
effect:
【Burst】Deploy this card.
【Deploy】Add 1 of your Shields to your hand.
【Destroyed】If you have an (AEUG) Link Unit in play, choose 1 enemy Unit with 4 or less HP. Rest it.

name: Mikazuki Augus
effect:

【When Paired】Choose 1 of your Units and 1 enemy Unit. Deal 1 damage to them.
